name: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology
oneLine: Wildcard cert expires 2026-05-09 (12 days); DMARC absent

urgentActions.what: Add DMARC record (start with p=none for reporting, then tighten)

fingerprints.stack: Custom 'My httpd server' (obfuscated Apache) + ASP.NET backend
versions: Wildcard cert *.rgipt.ac.in TLS — EXPIRES 2026-05-09 (11 DAYS — CRITICAL)
eolFlags: IMMINENT wildcard expiry — blocks all student portals

fingerprints.stack: Moodle LMS / admissions portal / grade portal

attackPaths.name: Wildcard cert expiry (11 days) → student-portal downtime
attackPaths.entry: Wildcard *.rgipt.ac.in expires 2026-05-09. All subdomains fail TLS validation.
attackPaths.pivot: During downtime, attackers can MITM any subdomain — particularly admissions during cycle.
attackPaths.objective: Credential interception; trust erosion; admissions disruption.

attackPaths.name: Moodle CVE-2024-43425 RCE (calculated questions)
attackPaths.entry: Moodle 4.4.0–4.4.1 / 4.3.0–4.3.5 / 4.2.0–4.2.8 / older — command injection in calculated question type (CVSS 7.5, authenticated).
attackPaths.pivot: Authenticated user crafts question; RCE on Moodle host.
attackPaths.objective: Student data exfiltration; grade tampering; lateral move.

attackPaths.name: Admissions portal CSRF / IDOR
attackPaths.entry: No CSP; weak CSRF protection if tokens absent.
attackPaths.pivot: CSRF request modifies application status; IDOR exposes other applicants' data.

attackPaths.name: Soft SPF + absent DMARC → student-targeted phishing
attackPaths.pivot: Forged @rgipt.ac.in to students with phishing link (fake grade portal, registration deadline).

attackPaths.name: Academics portal IDOR / broken access control
attackPaths.entry: academics.rgipt.ac.in is grade/transcript portal; if SQLi or IDOR present.
attackPaths.pivot: Access other students' grades; modify transcripts.

paths.preAi: Cert-expiry MITM during 11-day downtime + admission cycle
paths.mythos: AI-augmented attacker pre-stages rogue cert for admissions subdomain, times exploitation to admission deadline
AI-augmented attacker scans for vulnerable Moodle versions sector-wide; RGIPT picked because public-information entity has predictable patch lag

cisoPatchList.title: EMERGENCY: Rotate wildcard *.rgipt.ac.in cert before 2026-05-09
cisoPatchList.fix: Order new wildcard cert IMMEDIATELY (target install 2026-05-07). Cover all subdomains. Have rollback plan if renewal fails.
cisoPatchList.validation: openssl s_client | x509 -noout -enddate shows notAfter > 2026-05-15 on each subdomain

cisoPatchList.title: Patch / upgrade Moodle to 4.4.2+ / 4.3.6+ / 4.2.9+ / 4.1.12+
cisoPatchList.fix: Identify current Moodle version. Apply patch/upgrade to supported LTS. Test course authoring + calculated questions + assessments post-patch.
cisoPatchList.validation: Moodle admin → site information shows patched version

cisoPatchList.title: Publish DMARC + harden SPF
cisoPatchList.fix: SPF ~all → -all after verifying legitimate senders covered. DMARC: 'v=DMARC1; p=quarantine; rua=mailto:dmarc@rgipt.ac.in; fo=1'. Monitor 2 weeks → p=reject.

cisoPatchList.title: Add CSP header + CSRF token validation on admissions portal
cisoPatchList.fix: Add CSP (nonce-based). Server-side CSRF token validation on every state-changing request.
cisoPatchList.validation: curl -i shows CSP; CSRF PoC blocked

cisoPatchList.title: Access control audit on academics portal (IDOR prevention)
cisoPatchList.fix: Audit all endpoints for direct object references; require authorisation check on every request.
cisoPatchList.validation: Test student-A token cannot access student-B grades

cisoPatchList.title: Moodle security hardening + role-based access
cisoPatchList.fix: Disable unused plugins. Restrict question authoring to verified instructors. Audit role permissions.
cisoPatchList.validation: Plugin list reviewed; role permissions documented

cisoPatchList.title: Subdomain monitoring + CT log alerts
cisoPatchList.fix: Subscribe to certspotter or Censys CT monitoring on rgipt.ac.in.
cisoPatchList.validation: CT alerts configured; test fires on new cert issuance

cisoPatchList.title: Email security training for faculty + students
cisoPatchList.fix: Annual phishing-awareness training. Quarterly simulated phishing.
cisoPatchList.validation: Training completion records; simulation click-rate trend

cisoPatchList.title: Penetration testing + vulnerability scanning
cisoPatchList.fix: Quarterly pen-test by external firm. Continuous Nessus / OWASP ZAP scanning.
cisoPatchList.validation: Quarterly report on file; remediation tracking

phase2.headlineQuestion: RGIPT has 11 days until wildcard cert expiration (blocking all student portals during admission season), a vulnerable Moodle instance (CVE-2024-43425 RCE), and absent email authentication. Is the cert renewal under way and Moodle patched, or are portal outages imminent?
